name: Moskov/Patch history
intro: Moskov, the expertised spearton was the main phase of fame during the warrior tournament of the tribes. He was already a battle master, since his youth. He had inherited the family's occult spear fighting skills, and as the next leader of the clan of Wildsand, he was loved and respected by many. Watching Wildsand clan growing stronger day after day, Kublai, the leader of Thornwolf, the rival clan of Wildsand, couldn't hold back and let them become the new hegemony on Hietala grassland.
